channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Enhanced Games begin Sunday: What to know about the controversial event
item.description: Dozens of athletes, including former Olympians, will compete in Las Vegas while using performance-enhancing drugs.

item.title: Nurse convicted in patient death now speaks nationally on hospital safety
item.description: RaDonda Vaught, convicted of negligent homicide for administering the wrong drug, now delivers speeches on hospital safety.

item.title: Since its creation, Homeland Security has fueled political division
item.description: Originally intended to promote unity and comfort, the term "homeland security" has since become a source of political tension.

item.title: Russia strikes Kyiv with hypersonic Oreshnik missile in mass attack
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy reported that Russia used the advanced Oreshnik hypersonic missile during a large-scale drone and missile assault on Sunday.
